requirement_topic.en: BPS/DTI PS Mark for Covered Electrical Products
requirement_topic.zh: 覆盖电气产品的 BPS/DTI PS 标志
requirement_topic.zht: 覆蓋電氣產品的 BPS/DTI PS 標誌

summary.en: BPS under DTI issues Philippine National Standards and operates mandatory product certification for covered products. Covered electrical products may require the Philippine Standard Quality Mark before local sale, supported by product testing, factory assessment, and conformity evidence against applicable PNS.
summary.zh: DTI 下属 BPS 发布菲律宾国家标准，并对覆盖产品实施强制产品认证。覆盖电气产品在当地销售前可能需要取得菲律宾标准质量标志，并以产品测试、工厂评估和适用 PNS 符合性证据支持。
summary.zht: DTI 下屬 BPS 發布菲律賓國家標準，並對覆蓋產品實施強制產品認證。覆蓋電氣產品在當地銷售前可能需要取得菲律賓標準品質標誌，並以產品測試、工廠評估和適用 PNS 符合性證據支持。

standards_or_laws: Applicable PNS for covered electrical products

summary.en: China suppliers may have CCC certificates for low-voltage motors in CCC scope, GB 18613 efficiency evidence, and GB 12665 cooling evidence. These are useful inputs for a technical file but do not replace the Philippines PS Mark route.
summary.zh: 中国供应商可能持有 CCC 目录范围内低压电机的 CCC 证书、GB 18613 能效依据和 GB 12665 冷却依据。这些可作为技术文件输入，但不能替代菲律宾 PS 标志路径。
summary.zht: 中國供應商可能持有 CCC 目錄範圍內低壓電機的 CCC 證書、GB 18613 能效依據和 GB 12665 冷卻依據。這些可作為技術文件輸入，但不能替代菲律賓 PS 標誌路徑。

standards_or_laws: CCC catalogue requirements for motors under 1 kV where applicable

gap.en: A China CCC certificate is not a Philippines PS Mark. Importers must confirm whether the motor model is on the BPS mandatory list and, if covered, obtain the local certification route before sale.
gap.zh: 中国 CCC 证书不是菲律宾 PS 标志。进口商必须确认电机型号是否列入 BPS 强制清单；如被覆盖，应在销售前取得当地认证路径。
gap.zht: 中國 CCC 證書不是菲律賓 PS 標誌。進口商必須確認電機型號是否列入 BPS 強制清單；如被覆蓋，應在銷售前取得當地認證路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when the product is covered by BPS mandatory certification
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where CCC and China standards apply in China

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS), Department of Trade and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Check BPS coverage early. If the motor is covered, plan for PS Mark certification rather than relying on China CCC or GB reports alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应尽早核查 BPS 覆盖范围。如电机被覆盖，应规划 PS 标志认证，而不是仅依赖中国 CCC 或 GB 报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應儘早核查 BPS 覆蓋範圍。如電機被覆蓋，應規劃 PS 標誌認證，而不是僅依賴中國 CCC 或 GB 報告。

requirement_topic.en: Import Commodity Clearance for Non-PS Certified Imports
requirement_topic.zh: 非 PS 认证进口品的进口商品清关
requirement_topic.zht: 非 PS 認證進口品的進口商品清關

summary.en: For imported covered products that do not already carry the PS Mark, BPS/DTI may require Import Commodity Clearance before release or distribution. ICC review can require shipment documents, test reports, product identification, and evidence against applicable PNS requirements.
summary.zh: 对于未预先持有 PS 标志的进口覆盖产品，BPS/DTI 可能要求在放行或分销前取得进口商品清关。ICC 审查可能要求装运文件、测试报告、产品识别信息以及针对适用 PNS 要求的证据。
summary.zht: 對於未預先持有 PS 標誌的進口覆蓋產品，BPS/DTI 可能要求在放行或分銷前取得進口商品清關。ICC 審查可能要求裝運文件、測試報告、產品識別信息以及針對適用 PNS 要求的證據。

standards_or_laws: Applicable PNS for imported covered electrical products

summary.en: China export packs commonly contain invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, factory test reports, GB 18613 evidence, and CCC certificates where applicable. These documents must be supplemented with Philippines ICC-specific documentation and local importer filings.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件包通常包含发票、装箱单、原产地证、工厂测试报告、GB 18613 依据及适用时的 CCC 证书。这些文件必须补充菲律宾 ICC 专项文件和当地进口商申报。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件包通常包含發票、裝箱單、原產地證、工廠測試報告、GB 18613 依據及適用時的 CCC 證書。這些文件必須補充菲律賓 ICC 專項文件和當地進口商申報。

standards_or_laws: CCC catalogue requirements for motors under 1 kV where applicable

gap.en: The import gap is procedural and can block customs release or distribution. A shipment of China motors without PS Mark or ICC planning may be delayed even if the underlying technical design is acceptable.
gap.zh: 进口差距属于程序性问题，可能阻碍海关放行或分销。即使底层技术设计可接受，未规划 PS 标志或 ICC 的中国电机货物也可能延误。
gap.zht: 進口差距屬於程序性問題，可能阻礙海關放行或分銷。即使底層技術設計可接受，未規劃 PS 標誌或 ICC 的中國電機貨物也可能延誤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for covered imports without applicable PS certification
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory China export documents do not replace Philippines ICC

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS), Department of Trade and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For covered imported motors, decide before shipment whether the route is PS Mark certification or ICC. Do not ship on China documents alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对覆盖范围内的进口电机，应在出货前决定走 PS 标志认证还是 ICC 路径。不要仅凭中国文件出货。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對覆蓋範圍內的進口電機，應在出貨前決定走 PS 標誌認證還是 ICC 路徑。不要僅憑中國文件出貨。

requirement_topic.en: Importer Responsibility and Product Identity Control
requirement_topic.zh: 进口商责任与产品身份控制
requirement_topic.zht: 進口商責任與產品身份控制

summary.en: Philippines importers and distributors are responsible for ensuring that imported motors match the certified or cleared model, rating, brand, nameplate, frequency, voltage, and technical file. Product identity matters because 50 Hz and 60 Hz variants of the same frame or model family may not be equivalent.
summary.zh: 菲律宾进口商和经销商负责确保进口电机与已认证或已清关的型号、额定值、品牌、铭牌、频率、电压和技术文件相符。产品身份非常重要，因为同一机座或型号系列的 50 Hz 与 60 Hz 变体可能并不等同。
summary.zht: 菲律賓進口商和經銷商負責確保進口電機與已認證或已清關的型號、額定值、品牌、銘牌、頻率、電壓和技術文件相符。產品身份非常重要，因為同一機座或型號系列的 50 Hz 與 60 Hz 變體可能並不等同。

standards_or_laws: BPS/DTI market surveillance and product certification rules

summary.en: China factories often maintain model families with domestic 50 Hz variants and export 60 Hz variants. GB 18613, GB 12665, and CCC evidence must be mapped carefully to the exact exported model, not merely to a similar China domestic product family.
summary.zh: 中国工厂通常拥有国内 50 Hz 变体和出口 60 Hz 变体的型号系列。GB 18613、GB 12665 和 CCC 证据必须仔细映射到准确出口型号，而不能仅对应相似的中国国内产品系列。
summary.zht: 中國工廠通常擁有國內 50 Hz 變體和出口 60 Hz 變體的型號系列。GB 18613、GB 12665 和 CCC 證據必須仔細映射到準確出口型號，而不能僅對應相似的中國國內產品系列。

standards_or_laws: CCC catalogue requirements for motors under 1 kV where applicable

gap.en: The risk is model substitution: a certified 60 Hz export model and a cheaper China 50 Hz domestic model may look similar but are not the same compliance article. Import records, labels, certificates, and test reports should identify the exact Philippines variant.
gap.zh: 风险在于型号替换：已认证的 60 Hz 出口型号与较低成本的中国 50 Hz 国内型号可能外观看似相似，但不是同一合规产品。进口记录、标签、证书和测试报告应识别准确的菲律宾变体。
gap.zht: 風險在於型號替換：已認證的 60 Hz 出口型號與較低成本的中國 50 Hz 國內型號可能外觀看似相似，但不是同一合規產品。進口記錄、標籤、證書和測試報告應識別準確的菲律賓變體。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory practical obligation under certification, import clearance, and market surveillance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only to China domestic certification scope unless exported variant is separately documented

source.publisher: Department of Trade and Industry, Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lock the exact 60 Hz Philippines model identity before certification and shipment. Avoid treating a similar China 50 Hz model as interchangeable.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应在认证和出货前锁定准确的菲律宾 60 Hz 型号身份。避免将相似的中国 50 Hz 型号视为可互换。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應在認證和出貨前鎖定準確的菲律賓 60 Hz 型號身份。避免將相似的中國 50 Hz 型號視為可互換。
